Specifies that `serial_dump.txt` should be ignored by Git.

# Purpose
The `serial_dump.txt` file is used to store the output data from a serial communication interface. It captures and logs the data transmitted over the serial port, which can be useful for debugging, analysis, or record-keeping purposes. The file serves as a persistent record of the serial data exchanged during the operation of the software.
